name: part_008
file: tmp_【3D LIVE】ゲスト多数 &超告知＆新衣装あり‼ さくらみこ生誕祭2026＂ Fashion Beat ＂ 🌸【 #さくらみこ生誕祭2 [B3OxuRMofcM]_gemini-3-flash-preview\reencoded\part_008.mov

scenes.description: Sakura Miko finishes performing her song 'Sakurairo' on a pink-themed stage.
Audience interaction and dance interlude. Miko encourages the crowd.
MC segment. Sakura Miko thanks the fans and shows off multiple outfit variations (costume changes).
Sakura Miko performs her song 'Fighting My Way' with dynamic lighting and visual effects.
